projects.title: Enterprise Mobile SDK Ecosystem
projects.shortDescription: Reusable SDK framework adopted across multiple enterprise teams at Cognizant
projects.description: Designed and built a comprehensive enterprise SDK ecosystem comprising Network, UI, and Standard libraries. The SDK was adopted across different teams, reducing code duplication by 25% and accelerating development velocity by 35%. Implements Clean Architecture with protocol-oriented design, supporting both Swift and Flutter (via Dart FFI).

projects.title: Government e-Governance iOS App
projects.shortDescription: Secure iOS app for 10K+ users with AES-256/GCM encryption for national e-Governance systems
projects.description: Architected and developed a secure, government-compliant iOS application with AES-256/GCM encryption and certificate pinning. Integrated with national e-Governance systems serving 10,000+ daily users. Built from scratch to App Store release owning the complete end-to-end lifecycle.

projects.title: EduSams – School Management Platform
projects.shortDescription: Cloud-based school management for the African market driving 55% revenue growth during COVID-19
projects.description: Architected and delivered a comprehensive cloud-based school management platform for the African market. The platform enabled remote education during COVID-19 lockdowns, driving 55% revenue growth for clients. Led end-to-end development of 3 production iOS applications using MVVM with SwiftUI/UIKit.

projects.title: Personal Portfolio Website
projects.shortDescription: This very portfolio – built with Flutter Web, Clean Architecture, and Riverpod
projects.description: A premium personal portfolio website built entirely with Flutter Web. Features include dark/light themes, smooth animations, glassmorphism design, blog system, admin panel, and full CMS with JSON-based storage. Deployed via GitHub Pages with automated CI/CD.

projects.title: Fastlane CI/CD Pipeline Framework
projects.shortDescription: Reduced iOS/Flutter deployment from 1.5 hours to 20 minutes across enterprise teams
projects.description: Designed and implemented enterprise-grade CI/CD pipelines using Fastlane for iOS and Flutter apps. Automated testing, code signing, build distribution, and App Store/Play Store deployments. Reduced deployment time from 1.5 hours to 20 minutes, freeing developer time for feature work.
